name: Pallid Hart — Upper Floor
_mapNotes: Grid 140px, 4200×2800. Upper hallway y≈1960. Guest rooms y≈490. Coord anchors derived from zone centers in config/maps/pallidheart2.json.

items.name: Silver Dagger
items.description: Well-maintained. Recently sharpened. This was his primary tool.
items.mechanical: +1 to attack rolls against undead. Counts as magical for damage resistance. Silver — bypasses lycanthrope immunity.

items.name: Holy Water x3
items.description: Three vials, wax-sealed, marked with different ecclesiastical seals.
items.mechanical: 2d6 radiant damage to undead. Destroys vampire spawn at 0 HP.

items.name: Wooden Stakes x6
items.description: Hawthorn. Carved by hand. He made these himself.
items.mechanical: Paralyzes vampire or spawn reduced to 0 HP. Prevents regeneration while staked.

items.name: Healer's Kit (2 uses)
items.mechanical: Stabilize dying creature without Medicine check.

items.name: Pieter's Journal
items.description: Leather-bound. Heavily used. Twenty years of notes. Maps of Orava and Houska. The final entry stops mid-sentence.
items.mechanical: Contains Orava and Houska maps. Key campaign item.

items.name: Hidden Page
items.description: Sewn into the lining of the pack. Not paper. Something else. Warm.
items.findMethod: Active search of pack lining specifically
items.mechanical: Artifact. Sets carrier via POST /api/artifact/page-carrier and begins influence tracking (see ambient-life-service).

onFind.maxWhisper: The page has been found. Set the carrier via POST /api/artifact/page-carrier with the finding player's ID. Vladislav will sense this within moments.

encounters.maxWhisper: Spawn hunting trigger — player alone upstairs after midnight. Alert spawn tokens.

onEnter.maxWhisper: Players are on the upper floor. Pieter's body in room-2 — door unlocked. Vampire spawn tokens placed hidden in hallway west and east. Dispatch creature:player_upstairs to alert spawn state machine.
